message:
Reject NaN in float parsing, enforce GETEX PERSIST arity, and fix ZSTORE weight/aggregate argument parsing

- Add NaN rejection to parse_f64_arg and return ValueNotFloat error
  instead of InvalidInteger for parse failures, matching Redis behavior
  where NaN is not a valid float score
- Enforce that GETEX with PERSIST option accepts exactly 3 arguments
  (key + PERSIST), returning SyntaxError for trailing arguments
- Rewrite parse_zstore_args to accept numkeys parameter and parse
  exactly numkeys weight values instead of greedily consuming parseable
  floats, preventing misinterpretation of AGGREGATE keyword as a weight;
  return SyntaxError for unrecognized trailing arguments instead of
  silently skipping them

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
